qualify-afrelationship-enum.note: When assigning the AFRelationship for a FileSpecification, reference the enum via its declaring type (Aspose.Pdf.AFRelationship) rather than through an instance or nested type.
qualify-afrelationship-enum.code:
FileSpecification fileSpec = new FileSpecification(stream, "invoice.xml", "ZUGFeRD Invoice XML");
fileSpec.AFRelationship = Aspose.Pdf.AFRelationship.Data;
errors: CS0120: An object reference is required for the non-static field, method, or property 'FileSpecification.AFRelationship'
CS0176: Member 'AFRelationship.Data' cannot be accessed with an instance reference; qualify it with a type name instead

use-filespecification-name-instead-of-fi.note: When accessing the original file name of an embedded file, use the `Name` property of `FileSpecification` instead of the non‑existent `FileName` property.
use-filespecification-name-instead-of-fi.code:
FileSpecification fileSpec = embeddedFiles[i];
string fileName = fileSpec.Name; // correct way to get the embedded file's name
errors: CS1061: 'FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'FileName'
CS1061: 'FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'FileName' (multiple occurrences)

use-filespec-name-and-contents.note: When accessing an embedded file in Aspose.PDF, use the `Name` property to get the file name and the `Contents` stream to read the data; the older `FileName` property and `GetFileStream()` method are not available.
errors: CS1061: 'FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'FileName'
CS1061: 'FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'GetFileStream'

check-embeddedfile-exists-before-delete.note: Iterate Document.EmbeddedFiles to verify an attachment exists before calling EmbeddedFiles.Delete, preventing an exception when the file is missing
errors: Aspose.Pdf exception thrown when calling EmbeddedFiles.Delete for a non‑existent attachment

encrypt-pdf-with-user-and-owner-password.note: Use Document.Encrypt(userPassword, ownerPassword, permissions, cryptoAlgorithm) to protect a PDF with both user and owner passwords and specify required permissions.
encrypt-pdf-with-user-and-owner-password.code:
Permissions perms = Permissions.PrintDocument | Permissions.ExtractContent;

document.Encrypt("userPass123", "ownerPass123", perms, CryptoAlgorithm.AESx256);
errors: PDF is not encrypted because Document.Encrypt was not called with an owner password
Insufficient security when only a user password is supplied or when permissions are not specified

use-javascriptaction-set-pagenum.note: Set the document's OpenAction to a JavascriptAction that assigns the zero‑based page index to this.pageNum to open the PDF on a specific page.
errors: PDF opens on the first page instead of the desired page
Missing or incorrect JavaScript for page navigation in OpenAction

create-document-if-input-missing.note: Before loading a PDF, check if the file exists; if it does not, instantiate a new Document, add at least one page, and save it so subsequent Aspose.Pdf operations can work.
errors: System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could not find file '.../input.pdf'
Runtime errors when accessing document.Pages on a non‑existent file

process-all-operators-no-limit.note: Iterate over the entire OperatorCollection when replacing text; do not limit processing to four operators because Aspose.PDF evaluation mode only allows up to 4 elements per operation.
errors: Operator collection processing limited to 4 elements causing incomplete text replacement
Text replacement fails because only a subset of operators is examined

remove-graph-position-usage.note: Do not set a Position on a Graph object; instead add the Graph directly to a page's Paragraphs collection to place it.
remove-graph-position-usage.code:
Graph graph = new Graph(width, height);
page.Paragraphs.Add(graph); // Graph is positioned automatically
errors: CS1061: 'Graph' does not contain a definition for 'Position'
CS0246: The type or namespace name 'Position' could not be found

use-textfragment-for-graph-title.note: Assign a TextFragment instance to Graph.Title instead of a plain string.
use-textfragment-for-graph-title.code:
Graph graph = new Graph(width, height);
graph.Title = new TextFragment("My Graph Title");
errors: CS0029: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose.Pdf.Text.TextFragment' when assigning to Graph.Title

check-file-exists-before-document-constr.note: Verify the PDF file exists before passing its path to the Document constructor to avoid FileNotFoundException.
errors: System.IO.FileNotFoundException when Document constructor receives a non‑existent file path

validate-file-existence-before-xmlloadop.note: Resolve XML and XSLT file paths relative to the executable directory using AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory and verify their existence before creating XmlLoadOptions.
errors: System.IO.FileNotFoundException when XmlLoadOptions is constructed with a relative XSLT path
Runtime errors due to missing XML or XSLT files

use-pageinfo-width-height.note: Set a PDF page's dimensions via the PageInfo object (Width, Height, optional IsLandscape) instead of calling a non‑existent SetPageSize method.
errors: CS1061: 'Page' does not contain a definition for 'SetPageSize'
Runtime: Missing method error when attempting to change page size
